message:
fix(codegen): Use writeLocalVarName for consistent variable escaping in reassignment

Fixes variable name escaping in reassignment statements to match declaration
escaping. Previously used writeEscapedIdent which only handles Zig keywords,
but declarations use writeLocalVarName which also handles shadowing names
(e.g., "init" -> "init_"). This inconsistency caused "use of undefined"
errors when reassigning variables with names that shadow Zig builtins.
